text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

203 
RDLGY_DGNSTC_IND_SW 
LABEL: 
Diagnostic Radiology Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: The switch indicating whether the beneficiary received diagnostic radiology services during the stay. 
SHORT NAME: DGNSTCSW 
LONG NAME: RDLGY_DGNSTC_IND_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No diagnostic radiology (revenue code not 032x) 
1 = Yes diagnostic radiology (revenue code 032x)
